session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the result. Focus on test failures and type errors. Ignore prettier/formatting failures. Report the count of passing and failing tests.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check tests and type errors

session.assistant: Now let me run the erk-mcp tests directly to see the full output:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run erk-mcp tests to get full output

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp && uv run pytest tests/ -v 2>&1 | grep -E "(passed|failed|error)" | tail -5

session.assistant: Perfect! Now let me verify the prettier formatting issue that caused the make failure:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check which files have prettier formatting issues

session.tool_result: [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
session.assistant:
## Summary
**make fast-ci failed: Prettier formatting issue (not test failures)**
### Test Results (All Passing)
- **Unit Tests (erk)**: 6026 passed - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 49 passed
**Total**: 6326 tests passed, 0 failed
### Type Checking
- **ty**: All checks passed
### Code Quality
- **Lint (ruff check)**: All checks passed - **Format (ruff format)**: All files formatted - **Prettier**: Code style issues found in 2 markdown files - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 1 due to the prettier formatting issues, not due to test or type failures. All unit and type checks passed successfully.
